protocol.scope: read-only first-update gradient audit on one fresh K=8 dev seed; no optimizer step, parameter mutation, training, checkpoint selection, blind-seed reuse, formal validation, or test access
protocol.scientific_question: does uniform all-token sensory CE oppose the return-conflict gradient and suppress confidence-conditioned history transport, or does return-conflict CE itself reject the transport geometry
protocol.audited_model_state: the exact step-0 M1j initialization from the frozen M1j pilot, initialized from source M1i; the trained M1j checkpoint is not loaded

loss_views.all_token_ce: mean sensory cross-entropy over every sequence token
loss_views.clean_query_ce: mean sensory cross-entropy only where batch.clean_mask is true
loss_views.return_conflict_ce: mean sensory cross-entropy only where batch.return_mask and batch.conflict_mask are both true

protocol.forward_boundary: all three losses are sliced from one identical causal model forward; metadata masks are never model inputs and are used only after prediction logits exist
protocol.gradient_scope: the final transport Linear(8,1) weight and bias, exactly 9 dimensions; at the exact zero-final initialization the other 68 transport parameters must have zero gradient
protocol.event_direction_definition: for each history-available proposal, compute the first-order logit-shift change under the unit gradient-descent direction; the frozen decision uses events in the final return segment and also reports all history events
prohibited_operations: using generator seed 16180 from the M1j blind pilot
feeding room id, segment id, return mask, conflict mask, position, place id, or target metadata into the model
protocol.post_result_rule: classify once with the frozen thresholds; do not tune on seed17181; any trained follow-up must use a new protocol and new train, monitor, and blind generator seeds
